calendar.matters:
PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2008 Off Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Hearing on Petition to Approve Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Roger L. Sisneros, Esq. appeared with petitioner Yet Ming Wong, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for Michelle Wong, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
The minor was placed under oath and testified, and also served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $21,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $5,224.17.
Medical Expenses - $8,010.05.
Costs - $103.32.
A net balance of $7,662.46 shall be deposited into a blocked account with United Commercial Bank, located at 2533 Noriega Street, San Francisco, CA 94122. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-02-08; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Jul-14-08 At 09:00 A.M.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Off Calendar
